results.title: Panakkad Sayyid Nasir Abdul Hayya Shihabuddin Ba'alawi assumes office as new Dakshina Kannada Qazi
results.description: Daijiworld Media Network - Mangaluru Mangaluru, Jul 22: Panakkad Sayyid Nasir Abdul Hayya Shihabuddin Ba'alawi formally assumed office as the new Qazi of Dakshina Kannada district at a ceremony held at Zeenath Baksh Yatheem Khana Hall on Ansari Road, Bunder, on Wednesday.

results.title: ED arrests alleged IPL betting syndicate operator in Assam money laundering probe
results.description: Daijiworld Media Network - New Delhi Guwahati, Jul 22: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has arrested an alleged key operator of an organised illegal Indian Premier League (IPL) betting network as part of an ongoing money laundering investigation under the Prevention of Money Laundering A....

results.title: Maternal deaths in Jodhpur renew concerns over Rajasthan’s emergency obstetric care
results.description: Daijiworld Media Network - Jaipur Jaipur, Jul 21: The deaths of two women following childbirth in Jodhpur have once again brought Rajasthan's maternal healthcare system under scrutiny, raising questions about emergency obstetric care and referral mechanisms despite the state government's....

results.title: Nolan Wells Autopsy: Family Demands Answers as Investigation Continues
results.description: An independent autopsy has failed to establish a clear cause of death for 18-year-old Nolan Wells, whose family attorney says the findings remain inconclusive as an official state autopsy is still pending. Wells' mother and NAACP leaders are pressing local authorities for a more thorough investigation into his death.
